_comment: Engine version surfaced in generated reference pages (scripts/generate-reference.py). The SSoT is release-matrix.json engine.version (https://github.com/ozinc/arcflow/releases/latest/download/release-matrix.json). This literal mirrors the value AT THE TIME OF LAST SYNC; bump on each release until manifest-fetch is wired into generate-reference.py. See docs/reference/versioning for the full version chain.
